# Environment for the evaluation stage (operates on synthesized wavs only).
#
# No TTS backbone required, so this can be a small standalone env (or you can reuse
# a backbone env). Metric models: Emotion2Vec (E-SIM/TEP), Whisper-Large-V3 (WER),
# WavLM-base-sv (S-SIM).
#
#   conda create -n cocoemo_eval python=3.10 -y
#   conda activate cocoemo_eval
#   pip install -r env/eval.txt

torch==2.6.0
torchaudio==2.6.0
numpy>=1.26
funasr==1.3.0             # Emotion2Vec (iic/emotion2vec_plus_large)
modelscope==1.20.0        # model hub for funasr
openai-whisper==20250625  # Whisper-Large-V3 for WER
transformers>=4.46        # WavLM-base-sv speaker embeddings (version-tolerant here)
jiwer==4.0.0              # WER computation
word2num==0.1.2           # number normalization in WER
librosa==0.10.2
soundfile==0.12.1
